summary: Full-stack testing of Prompt B5 'Cuentas Abiertas / Open Checks'. Backend pytest 13/13 green. Frontend UI verified on desktop (1920x1080) + mobile (390x844): all new testids present exactly once, sidebar item appears as LAST in 'Ventas y Caja' (after 'Ventas por Hora'), KPIs + table render, XLSX and PDF downloads trigger valid files (PK + %PDF signatures). Regression on prompts 1-4 (sales-by-category, cash-close-hierarchical, hourly-sales, taxes) PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: _minutes_since uses datetime.utcnow() vs parsed naive date — acceptable since opened_at is stored as UTC ISO. Works correctly for relative age display.

_open_checks_impl filters training_mode!=True and status in OPEN_STATUSES [active,sent,open,printed,pending] exactly matching spec. Seeded bills (T-901 active, T-902 sent, T-903 printed) are all returned correctly.
XLSX =SUM formulas verified programmatically for E,F,G,H (detail TOTAL) and B,C (RESUMEN POR MESERO TOTAL). No hardcoded sums.
PDF uses WeasyPrint with Letter LANDSCAPE and includes restaurant header, KPIs, detail table and resumen por mesero when data present.
XLSX/PDF endpoints properly require Bearer JWT (returns 401/403 without token) — auth guard present on both.

OpenChecksReport.jsx: all required testids present exactly once (open-checks-report, oc-kpi-count/value/oldest/avg, open-checks-table, oc-grand-total, oc-by-waiter, oc-download-pdf-btn, oc-download-xlsx-btn).
Reports.js sidebar: 'open-checks' is the last item in Ventas y Caja group (after 'hourly-sales'), order preserved as required.
Responsive: desktop shows full 8-column table, mobile shows condensed 4-column view (# Trans, Mesa, Minutos, Total) + KPIs 2-cols. Correctly implemented.
Empty state handled: shows 'No hay cuentas abiertas en este período ✅' with KPIs=0 and XLSX/PDF still downloadable (no 500).
test_credentials: Admin PIN 11338585 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login via POST /api/auth/login with {pin}.
seed_data_creation: Used the existing 3 seed bills marked with _seed_open_checks=True: T-901 (active, OSCAR, business_date=2026-04-21, total=1152), T-902 (sent, CARLOS, total=1280), T-903 (printed, OSCAR, total=1280). Total 3712. Cleanup note for future: db.bills.delete_many({'_seed_open_checks': True}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_open_checks_report.py covers: (1) JSON endpoint with seeds (count>=3, total>=3712, waiters OSCAR+CARLOS, ordered oldest first), (2) empty range returns 200 count=0, (3) status filter excludes paid/cancelled/void/voided/anulled, (4) XLSX auth 401, (5) XLSX valid PK + =SUM(E..H) in TOTAL row + =SUM(B..C) in RESUMEN POR MESERO, (6) XLSX empty data OK (no 500), (7) PDF auth 401, (8) PDF valid %PDF, (9) PDF empty OK, (10-13) regression sales-by-category + cash-close-hierarchical + hourly-sales + taxes (with breakdown_by_rate preserved). UI verified via Playwright: desktop + mobile viewports, open-checks-report exactly 1 instance, all testids visible, XLSX download → PK header (5643 bytes), PDF download → %PDF header (15492 bytes). Default UI date range was 2026-04-19 (today) so UI initial render was empty state; seeds live at 2026-04-21. To see seeds in UI change date pickers to 2026-04-21 and click Actualizar.
rca of the issue: No issues. Backend spec fully met (5 open statuses, training_mode filter, KPIs count/total/oldest/avg, sorted oldest first, by_waiter, by_table, by_status groupings). Frontend spec fully met (sidebar placement, testids, responsive layout, downloads). Auth enforced on export endpoints. XLSX formulas are real =SUM() (not hardcoded).
